steps.t: Blomley Sward, Helva's Edge, Hunter's Ledge, the East-delf, and the West-delf can all be found in the Wildwood. You should collect ore samples and ani…
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
Broken traps and dull pickaxes can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should repair these items for the League of the Axe.
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
